'''Galactic Alliance High Command''', also known as '''Galactic Alliance Command''', was combined commanding authority organ of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force|Defense Forces]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{Mo}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]''
